name: Cross My Heart with Hannah Beck

episodes.title: “Lesbians Are Doing Something Worse Than Sex” with Lauren Warwick | Cross My Heart Episode 11
episodes.description: Lauren is here for episode 11! (@notfunnylauren) This week we talked about leaving religion on TikTok before it was a thing, the shifting TikTok era, dream jokes, consciousness, signing an NDA, restorative justice, women being the original perverts, and the Big Bang Theory Cinematic Universe. Known for her viral "Tube top" video and "Dear Daddy God" diary series on TikTok, Hannah dives deep into the messy but beautiful reality of growing up queer in the Midwest. Cross My Heart is hosted by Hannah Beck. Follow @hannahbeckcomedy on TikTok and Instagram. New episodes every Monday. Comment, review, and tell your gay friends 🖤 Chapters: 0:00 – Victoria's Secret & gay signs 0:33 – Confessional: are you gay? 1:36 – Religious deconstruction 5:25 – Shifting TikTok, dream jokes, consciousness 9:36 – Hannah’s NDA 16:06 – Fletcher, JoJo Siwa, lesbian icons 20:31 – sneaking out & sex collages 26:23 – Women are the original good perverts 30:57 – What are you starting a cult for? 40:01 – Forgive me but: Partiful & the Big Bang Theory universe 45:26 – TV recommendations, writing a pilot HannahBeck #CrossMyHeartPodcast #GayPodcast #LesbianPodcast #QueerComedy #TikTokComedian #DearDaddyGod #ChicagoComedy #ComingOut #MidwestLGBTQ #ExEvangelical #ReligiousTrauma #ChristianDeconstruction #QueerTikTok #Podcast Keywords: Hannah Beck, Cross My Heart podcast, Chicago comedy, gay podcast, lesbian podcast, TikTok comedian, Dear Daddy God, religious trauma, ex-evangelical, queer comedy, Midwest LGBTQ, religious deconstruction, legal system, stand-up comedy, viral TikTok, queer, podcast, comfort creator, coming out stories, mental health, chosen family Cross My Heart is hosted by Hannah Beck. Follow @hannahbeckcomedy on TikTok and Instagram. New episodes every Monday. Rate, review, and tell your gay friends 🖤
